ddls:
CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "rec_name" TEXT /* Name of the record (asset) */,
  "rec_type" INTEGER /* Type of record (asset category) */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the investment or contract */,
  "value" REAL /* Current value of the asset */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset family */,
  "rate" REAL /* Current rate associated with the asset */,
  "start_value" REAL /* Initial value of the asset */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the investment or contract */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the record (asset) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the record (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family (e.g., Equities, Fixed Income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the family encapsulates */,
  "parent_family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent family (if any) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the family */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the family was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the family */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the family was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type (e.g., Stock, Bond) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the investment type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment type was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the investment type */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the investment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record associated with the dates */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the investment or contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the investment or contract */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the date record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the date record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the date record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the date record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_dates_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "valuations" (
  "valuation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each valuation record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record being valued */,
  "valuation_date" TEXT /* Date of the valuation */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the asset at the time of valuation */,
  "valuation_method" TEXT /* Method used for valuation (e.g., market value, book value) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the valuation record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the valuation record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the valuation record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the valuation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("valuation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_valuations_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record associated with this rate */,
  "rate_type" TEXT /* Type of rate (e.g., growth rate, interest rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the rate */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rate entry */,
  "rate_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the rate type (e.g., interest rate, growth rate) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the rate record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rate record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the rate record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rates_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related record */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the investment contract */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the contract record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contract record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the contract record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contract record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_contracts_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the access log record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the access log record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, warning, info) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the notification record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the notification record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
